title: Script Injection via github.event context
detail: Attacker-controlled input 'github.event.pull_request.title' used in 'run:' step — enables arbitrary command execution
remediation: Set the value as an environment variable instead: env: PR_TITLE: ${{ github.event.pull_request.title }}

title: Pwn Request: pull_request_target + checkout of PR head
detail: Workflow uses 'pull_request_target' trigger and checks out the PR head SHA — attacker's fork code runs with write access
remediation: Use 'pull_request' trigger instead, or avoid checking out the PR head code

title: Unpinned Action: some-org/deploy-action@main
detail: Action not pinned to a SHA — a compromised action repo could inject malicious code
remediation: Pin to a specific commit SHA: some-org/deploy-action@<full-sha>

title: Excessive Workflow Permissions
detail: Workflow uses 'permissions: write-all' — grants unnecessary access
remediation: Use least-privilege permissions: only grant 'contents: read' and 'pull-requests: write' if needed
